stemHtml: When using magnetic-measuring-type dip sticks, the quantity of fuel in the aircraft is determined by using the measurements...

options.a: from the dip sticks and the current OAT.
options.b: from the dip sticks and data tables in the aircraft documentation.
options.c: from the dip sticks and the fuel`s specific gravity.
options.d: directly from the dip sticks only.
